title: Shawnkyr Nuruodo

Therefore, Shawnkyr must have been [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] around [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]].</ref>—[[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]<ref name="Birth year 2">In {{GamerCite|7|Red Sky, Blue Flame}}, Shawnkyr mentions that she is 12 [[standard year]]s old. ''Red Sky, Blue Flame'' states that [[Jagged Fel]] is fourteen years old. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' states that Jagged was born in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]] which would place ''Red Sky, Blue Flame'' in [[21 ABY/Legends|21 ABY]]. Therefore, Shawnkyr must have been [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] around [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] instead.</ref>

{{Quote|Shawnkyr is a true member of a renegade phalanx, sir. She would not stay behind if I ordered her to.|Jagged Fel, to [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]]|<ref name="Dark Journey" />}}
'''Shawnkyr Nuruodo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Chiss officer/Legends|officer]] in [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo's Household Phalanx]] and a [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|Clawcraft]] [[TIE pilot|pilot]].

==Biography==
Shawnkyr was born to the influential [[Nuruodo family]], and by the age of twelve standard years, she served as a [[First Lieutenant/Legends|First Lieutenant]] and a [[cadet commander]] at the [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo training academy|military academy]] in the [[Rata Nebula/Legends|Rata Nebula]]. There, she first met the [[Human/Legends|Human]] trainee [[Jagged Fel]], two years her senior, and after repulsing a [[Battle of Rhigar|raid]] by the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]], she ceded leadership of the cadets to him.<ref name="RSBF" />

At some point in the next few years, Shawnkyr joined [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo's Household Phalanx]].<ref name="Dark Journey" /> By [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], she was Fel's [[Executive officer/Legends|executive officer]] in the [[force Spike]], in which capacity she served under him at the [[Battle of Garqi]].<ref name="Enemy Lines II">''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''</ref> In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]],<ref name="Dark Journey Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' to [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].</ref> she was the only pilot to accompany him on his scouting mission to former [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] space. On [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]], in spite of their orders not to get involved in the conflict, she assisted him in recruiting the unit of volunteer pilots that became [[Vanguard Squadron (Hapes)|Vanguard Squadron]].<ref name="Dark Journey" />

She later took over the squadron when Fel joined [[Twin Suns Squadron]].<ref name="Enemy Lines II" /> It is not known whether she remained with the Vanguards when a full squadron of [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|Clawcraft]] arrived to serve alongside the New Republic, and after the [[Battle of Ebaq|major victory]] over the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] at [[Ebaq 9]]<ref name="Force Heretic I">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''</ref> in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]],<ref name="Force Heretic I Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' to [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].</ref> she returned to Chiss space to report on developments in the war.<ref name="Force Heretic I" /> She returned to the front line in the final stages of the war, however, and when the surviving Clawcraft of the Chiss squadron were amalgamated into Twin Suns Squadron, she flew as Twin Suns Four during the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]].<ref name="Unifying Force" />

==Equipment==
As a [[Chiss officer/Legends|Chiss officer]] and [[TIE pilot]] of the [[Empire of the Hand]],<ref name="Enemy Lines II" /> Shawnkyr Nuruodo wore a [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Flight suit/Legends|flight suit]] that had [[Red Flame (symbol)|red piping]]<ref name="Unifying Force" /> representing the [[Red Flame]]—the essence of courage, cunning, and the ideal state of perfection that could be aspired to in the Chiss culture.<ref name="RSBF" /> She operated a [[Shawnkyr's clawcraft|''Nssis''-class Clawcraft]].<ref name="Dark Journey" />

==Behind the scenes==
The uncertainty over Shawnkyr's age comes because of questions concerning the chronological placing of the short story ''[[Red Sky, Blue Flame]]'', her earliest chronological appearance.<ref name="Birth year 1" /><ref name="Birth year 2" /> Also, her name does not correspond to the expected pattern of [[Chiss/Legends#Language and names|Chiss names]], probably because author [[Elaine Cunningham]] was not made aware of the precedent during the writing of the [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] novels.
